test_cases.test_case: Log in with valid credentials
preconditions: A registered student account exists with valid credentials
steps: 1. Navigate to the Moodle login page
2. Enter <valid username> in the Username field
3. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
4. Click 'Log in'
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Dashboard

test_cases.test_case: Log in with an empty username and password
steps: 1. Navigate to the Moodle login page
2. Leave the Username field empty
3. Leave the Password field empty
4. Click 'Log in'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message is displayed; both fields are cleared

test_cases.test_case: Log in with an invalid username
steps: 1. Navigate to the Moodle login page
2. Enter <invalid username> in the Username field
3. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
4. Click 'Log in'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message is displayed; the Password field is cleared; the Username field retains the entered value

test_cases.test_case: Log in with an invalid password
steps: 1. Navigate to the Moodle login page
2. Enter <valid username> in the Username field
3. Enter <invalid password> in the Password field
4. Click 'Log in'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message is displayed; the Password field is cleared; the Username field retains the entered value

test_cases.test_case: Log in with a username at maximum length
preconditions: A registered student account exists with maximum length username
steps: 1. Navigate to the Moodle login page
2. Enter <maximum length username> in the Username field
3. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
4. Click 'Log in'
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Dashboard

test_cases.test_case: Log in with a password at maximum length
preconditions: A registered student account exists with maximum length password
steps: 1. Navigate to the Moodle login page
2. Enter <valid username> in the Username field
3. Enter <maximum length password> in the Password field
4. Click 'Log in'
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Dashboard

test_cases.test_case: View the Dashboard with upcoming activities displayed
preconditions: User is enrolled in courses with upcoming activities
steps: 1. Navigate to the Dashboard
test_cases.expected_result: The Dashboard displays a personalized greeting, and the Timeline block shows upcoming activities and deadlines.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to filter the Timeline block with an invalid course selection
steps: 1. Navigate to the Dashboard
2. In the Timeline block, select an invalid course from the 'All courses' dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message is displayed indicating the course selection is invalid; the Timeline block does not update.

test_cases.test_case: Filter the Timeline block with a date range that contains no upcoming activities
preconditions: No activities are due within the next 7 days
steps: 1. Navigate to the Dashboard
2. In the Timeline block, select 'Next 7 days' from the time range dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The Timeline block displays an empty state message indicating no upcoming activities within the selected range.

test_cases.test_case: Create a new event in the Calendar block
steps: 1. Navigate to the Dashboard
2. In the Calendar block, click on the 'New event' button
3. Fill in the event details and save
test_cases.expected_result: The new event appears in the Calendar block for the selected date.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to create a new event without filling in required fields
steps: 1. Navigate to the Dashboard
2. In the Calendar block, click on the 'New event' button
3. Leave required fields empty and click 'Save'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message is displayed indicating required fields must be filled.

test_cases.test_case: Navigate to the Calendar block using left/right arrows at month boundaries
steps: 1. Navigate to the Dashboard
2. In the Calendar block, click the left arrow to go to the previous month
3. Click the right arrow to return to the current month
test_cases.expected_result: The Calendar block updates to show the previous month and then returns to the current month correctly.

test_cases.test_case: View all enrolled courses as visual cards
preconditions: User is enrolled in multiple courses
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
test_cases.expected_result: All enrolled courses are displayed as visual cards with course banner images, names, and category names

test_cases.test_case: Click on a course name to navigate to the course page
preconditions: At least one course is displayed on the My Courses page
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
2. Click on the course name of any displayed course
test_cases.expected_result: User is navigated to the main page of the selected course

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to use the search field with an empty input
preconditions: Multiple courses are displayed on the My Courses page
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
2. Leave the search field empty
3. Click the search button
test_cases.expected_result: All courses remain displayed without any filtering applied

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to star a course that is already starred
preconditions: At least one course is starred
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
2. Click the three-dot menu on a starred course
3. Select 'Star this course' again
test_cases.expected_result: No change occurs; the course remains starred and a message indicates it is already starred

test_cases.test_case: Filter courses using the status dropdown with 'Hidden'
preconditions: At least one course is hidden
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
2. Select 'Hidden' from the status dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Only hidden courses are displayed, or a message indicates no hidden courses if none exist

test_cases.test_case: Sort courses by name when there are multiple courses with similar names
preconditions: Multiple courses with similar names are displayed
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page
2. Select 'Sort by name' from the sort dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Courses are displayed in alphabetical order, with similar names grouped together

test_cases.test_case: View course content on the Course page
preconditions: User is enrolled in a course
steps: 1. Navigate to the Course page from the Dashboard
2. Observe the course name displayed as the page heading
3. Check the navigation tab bar is present
4. Expand a section by clicking the chevron next to the section name
test_cases.expected_result: The section expands to show the activities and resources listed within it

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to enable Edit mode on the Course page
preconditions: User is on the Course page
steps: 1. Look for an 'Edit' button or link on the Course page
test_cases.expected_result: No 'Edit' button or link is present; the user cannot enable Edit mode

test_cases.test_case: Collapse all sections on the Course page
preconditions: Multiple sections are expanded on the Course page
steps: 1. Navigate to the Course page
2. Click the 'Collapse all' link at the top right
test_cases.expected_result: All sections collapse, and only section names are visible without any activities or resources displayed

test_cases.test_case: View a section with no activities or resources
preconditions: User is enrolled in a course with at least one section that has no activities or resources
steps: 1. Navigate to the Course page
2. Expand the section that contains no activities or resources
test_cases.expected_result: The section expands but displays a message indicating that there are no activities or resources available

test_cases.test_case: View the Participants page with all enrolled users
preconditions: User is enrolled in a course
steps: 1. Navigate to the Participants page from the Course page
test_cases.expected_result: The Participants page displays a list of all enrolled users with their First/Last names, Roles, Groups, and Last access information

test_cases.test_case: Filter participants by First name using alphabetical filter
steps: 1. Click on the 'A' button in the First name alphabetical filter
test_cases.expected_result: The Participants table displays only users whose First names start with 'A'

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to apply filters without selecting any conditions
steps: 1. Click 'Apply filters' without adding any conditions
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that at least one condition must be selected to apply filters

test_cases.test_case: Apply filters with the 'Any' toggle and no specific conditions
steps: 1. Toggle the 'Any' option
2. Click 'Apply filters'
test_cases.expected_result: The Participants table displays all enrolled users as no specific conditions were applied

test_cases.test_case: Sort participants by Last name in descending order
steps: 1. Click on the Last name column header to sort in descending order
test_cases.expected_result: The Participants table displays users sorted by Last name in descending order

test_cases.test_case: View own grades on the Grades page
preconditions: At least one graded activity exists in the course
steps: 1. Navigate to the Grades page from the Course page
2. Observe the grade table displaying the Grade items, Calculated weight, Grade, Range, Percentage, Feedback, and Contribution to course total
test_cases.expected_result: The Grades page displays the student's own grades correctly with all relevant columns populated

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to access another student's grades
preconditions: Another student has grades in the course
steps: 1. Navigate to the Grades page
2. Attempt to access the full gradebook or another student's grades
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user does not have permission to view other students' grades

test_cases.test_case: View grades when no graded activities exist
preconditions: No graded activities exist in the course
steps: 1. Navigate to the Grades page
test_cases.expected_result: The Grades page displays a message indicating that there are no grades available for the student

test_cases.test_case: View grades with maximum number of graded activities
preconditions: The maximum number of graded activities is present in the course
steps: 1. Navigate to the Grades page
test_cases.expected_result: The Grades page displays all graded activities correctly without any layout issues or truncation

test_cases.test_case: Submit an assignment with both online text and file upload
preconditions: An assignment with online text and file submission is open and within the due date
steps: 1. Navigate to the Assignment page from the Course page
2. Click 'Add submission'
3. Enter <submission text> in the online text editor
4. Upload a valid file in the file upload area
5. Click 'Save changes'
test_cases.expected_result: Submission status row updates to 'Submitted for grading'; Last modified timestamp reflects the submission time

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to submit an assignment after the due date
preconditions: An assignment is past its due date
steps: 1. Navigate to the Assignment page from the Course page
2. Click 'Add submission'
3. Enter <submission text> in the online text editor
4. Click 'Save changes'
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that submissions are no longer accepted

test_cases.test_case: Submit an assignment with maximum length text in the online text editor
preconditions: An assignment with online text submission is open and within the due date
steps: 1. Navigate to the Assignment page from the Course page
2. Click 'Add submission'
3. Enter <maximum length submission text> in the online text editor
4. Click 'Save changes'
test_cases.expected_result: Submission status row updates to 'Submitted for grading'; Last modified timestamp reflects the submission time

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to submit an assignment without any content
preconditions: An assignment with online text submission is open and within the due date
steps: 1. Navigate to the Assignment page from the Course page
2. Click 'Add submission'
3. Leave the online text editor empty
4. Click 'Save changes'
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that submission cannot be empty

test_cases.test_case: View submission status after editing submission just before due date
preconditions: An assignment is open and due in 1 minute
steps: 1. Navigate to the Assignment page from the Course page
2. Click 'Add submission'
3. Enter <initial submission text> in the online text editor
4. Click 'Save changes'
5. Quickly edit the submission to <edited submission text>
6. Click 'Save changes'
test_cases.expected_result: Submission status row updates to 'Submitted for grading'; Last modified timestamp reflects the latest submission time

test_cases.test_case: View the Activities page with all sections displayed correctly
preconditions: User is enrolled in a course with activities
steps: 1. Navigate to the Activities page from the Course page
test_cases.expected_result: The Activities page displays the Assignments section expanded with a table showing Name, Due date, and Submission status; Forums and Resources sections are collapsed.

test_cases.test_case: Expand the Forums section to view its activities
preconditions: User is enrolled in a course with forum activities
steps: 1. Navigate to the Activities page from the Course page
2. Click the arrow to expand the Forums section
test_cases.expected_result: The Forums section expands to display a list of forum activities available in the course.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to access an activity that does not exist
preconditions: User is enrolled in a course
steps: 1. Navigate to the Activities page from the Course page
2. Click on a non-existent activity link
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the activity does not exist or is unavailable.

test_cases.test_case: Check the Activities page with no activities available
preconditions: User is enrolled in a course with no activities
steps: 1. Navigate to the Activities page from the Course page
test_cases.expected_result: The Activities page displays a message indicating that there are no activities available in the course.

test_cases.test_case: Update profile with valid information
preconditions: User is on the Profile page
steps: 1. Click 'Edit profile'
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
3. Click 'Update profile'
test_cases.expected_result: Profile is updated successfully; a confirmation message is displayed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update profile with missing required fields
preconditions: User is on the Profile page
steps: 1. Click 'Edit profile'
2. Leave required fields empty
3. Click 'Update profile'
test_cases.expected_result: Error messages are displayed for each missing required field; profile is not updated

test_cases.test_case: Update profile with maximum length description
preconditions: User is on the Profile page
steps: 1. Click 'Edit profile'
2. Fill in the Description field with maximum allowed characters
3. Click 'Update profile'
test_cases.expected_result: Profile is updated successfully; the description displays correctly with maximum length

test_cases.test_case: Upload a profile picture with maximum file size
preconditions: User is on the Profile page
steps: 1. Click 'Edit profile'
2. Upload a profile picture that is at the maximum allowed file size
3. Click 'Update profile'
test_cases.expected_result: Profile picture is updated successfully; the new picture displays on the profile

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update profile with invalid email format
preconditions: User is on the Profile page
steps: 1. Click 'Edit profile'
2. Enter an invalid email format in the Email address field
3. Click 'Update profile'
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid; profile is not updated
